# Test fixtures only — all values are documented test patterns or fictional.
# Used by tests/integration/serve/test_safety_pii_patterns.py to exercise
# the stargraph.bosun.safety_pii starter rule library (FR-36, design §16.9).

# SSNs (test patterns; structure-valid but not real allocations)
123-45-6789
555-12-3456

# Emails (RFC-5321 fictional)
alice@example.com
bob+tag@sub.domain.io

# Credit-card PANs (Luhn-valid documented test numbers)
4111-1111-1111-1111
5555-5555-5555-4444

# Phones (NANP fictional + 555 reserved range)
+1-555-123-4567
(555) 123-4567

# Plain prose (no PII — discrimination negatives)
The quarterly review meeting is scheduled for next Tuesday afternoon.
Stargraph's deterministic governance layer composes well with stateful agents.
The build pipeline ran clean across the full integration suite this morning.
We released the open-source policy bundle to the upstream registry.
